database.title: Database
database.subtitle: Organize anything into tables, fields and views
database.noBasesHint: Create your first base to start organizing data into tables.
database.confirmDeleteBase: Delete this base and ALL its tables, fields and rows? This cannot be undone.
database.noTables: This base has no tables yet
database.confirmDeleteTable: Delete this table and all its rows?
database.noRowsHint: Add your first row to this table.
database.confirmDeleteField: Delete this field? Its values will be removed from all rows.
database.filterAndHint: Show rows that match all of these conditions:
database.confirmDeleteView: Delete this view? Records aren't affected.
database.kanbanNeedsSelectHint: Add a single-select field in the grid, then stack by it.
database.kanbanPickField: Choose a field to stack cards by.
database.calendarNeedsDateHint: Add a date field in the grid to place records on a calendar.
database.calendarPickField: Choose a date field to lay out records.
database.notInWorkspace: No workspace member has that email
database.actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.noMeetingsTodayHint: A good moment to schedule the next one.
dashboard.noTasks: No open tasks — you're all caught up.
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Create your first meeting to get started
dashboard.deleteMeetingDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone. All meeting data will be removed.

tasks.pageSubtitle: Action items from meetings and your team's tasks.
tasks.loadError: Couldn't load tasks. Check your connection and try again.
tasks.overdueDays: {count, plural, one {Overdue by # day} other {Overdue by # days}}
tasks.emptyNoResultsDesc: Nothing matched “{query}”. Try a different search.
tasks.emptyAllDesc: Start a meeting — AI will extract action items automatically. Or create a task manually.

archive.title: Meeting archive
archive.subtitle: Search by title, participants, and transcripts of completed meetings
archive.emptyDesc: Completed meetings with AI reports will appear here automatically.
archive.emptySearchDesc: No meetings found for "{query}". Try a different search query.
archive.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete «{title}»? All meeting data (transcripts, reports, tasks) will be deleted permanently.

calendar.emptyHint: Tap “Create” to schedule your first one.

schedule.agendaEmptyHint: Add topics manually or generate them with AI based on the meeting title
schedule.toggleAiReport: AI summary & action items after the meeting
schedule.toggleAllowGuests: Allow guests to join via link

auth.tagline: Self-hosted video conferencing with AI transcription and automatic reports
auth.name: Name
auth.registerSubtitle: Your request is sent to an administrator for approval.
auth.requestSubmittedHint: An administrator needs to approve it. Once approved, you can sign in with your password.
auth.changePasswordHint: Enter your current and new password.
auth.setNewPasswordHint: This is your first sign-in — set your own password to continue.
auth.createPasswordHint: Welcome! Set a password to activate your account.
auth.inviteInvalidHint: Ask your workspace admin to send a new invitation.
auth.errRegPending: Your registration request has not yet been approved by an administrator. Please wait for approval.
auth.errRegExpired: Your registration request has expired. Please register again.
auth.errPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

join.errorNotFound: Meeting not found or token invalid
join.tokenWarning: The guest token is valid for 24 hours from creation and can be used only once.
join.introduceSubtitle: This information will be visible to other meeting participants
join.emailHint: If you provide an email, you'll receive a meeting summary after it ends

lobby.quickMeetingDesc: Start a quick meeting and invite colleagues with a link.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.timeMinutesAgo: {count, plural, one {{n} min ago} other {{n} min ago}}
notifications.timeHoursAgo: {count, plural, one {{n} h ago} other {{n} h ago}}
notifications.timeDaysAgo: {count, plural, one {{n} d ago} other {{n} d ago}}
notifications.reportReadyBody: The report for meeting "{title}" has been generated
notifications.mentionTitle: You were mentioned in the notes

report.sentToParticipants: Sent to {count, plural, one {# participant} other {# participants}}
report.deleteRecordingConfirm: Delete the meeting recording? This action cannot be undone.
report.deleteActionItemConfirm: Delete this action item? This action cannot be undone.
report.transcriptCount: {shown} of {total, plural, one {# reply} other {# replies}}
report.notFoundDesc: An AI report for this meeting hasn't been generated yet
report.generatingDesc: The AI is analysing the transcript. This usually takes under a minute.
report.failedDesc: Something went wrong while generating the report. You can try again.
report.fixLangDesc: Re-transcribe a speaker's audio in the correct language and regenerate the report. The choice is remembered for that person's future meetings.
report.fixLangNoSpeech: No speech recognized in that language
report.noExtendedDesc: It's generated automatically after each meeting.
report.chatIntro: Answers are grounded in this meeting's transcript, with citations you can click to jump to the moment.
report.chatDisclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Answers are based only on this meeting's transcript.
report.chatError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
report.chatEmpty: I couldn't find anything about that in this meeting.
report.chatNoTranscript: There's no transcript for this meeting yet, so the chat has nothing to work with.
report.chatSuggest1: Summarize the meeting in a few sentences
report.chatSuggest3: What action items came out of this?

quiz.title: Meeting quiz
quiz.guestsCantTake: Guests without an account can't be assigned a quiz
quiz.openBookHint: Let participants view the report while taking the quiz
quiz.generateHint: Generate questions from the report to get started
quiz.errFewOptions: Each question needs at least 2 options
quiz.errNoCorrect: Mark a correct answer for every question
quiz.noMine: No quizzes assigned to you yet
quiz.deleteConfirm: Delete this quiz and all its results? This can't be undone.

room.kickConfirm: Remove this participant from the meeting?
room.inviteHint: Share this link — guests can join without signing up
room.canRemoveParticipants: You can remove participants from the meeting
room.notesPlaceholder:
Jot down the key moments of the meeting here...

Notes sync for all participants.
room.aiEmptyLine2: after a few minutes of conversation
room.waitingDesc: The host needs to let you into the meeting. Please wait...

setup.tokenSub: Enter the setup token from the container logs to begin configuration.
setup.tokenHint: The token is printed to the container output on first start:
setup.identitySub: The name and domain are used in the interface, emails, and OAuth redirects.
setup.authSub: Choose how users will sign in. You can enable both at once.
setup.googleSsoDesc: Sign in with a Google account
setup.googleSetupHint: In Google Cloud → Credentials → OAuth client ID (Web application), add:
setup.selfRegDesc: Requests with manual admin approval (expire after 3 days)
setup.adminSubGoogle: The first account to sign in with Google becomes the administrator.
setup.finishHint: Complete setup — your account will be granted the administrator role, and the /setup page will be closed for good.
setup.signInGooglePrompt: Click “Sign in with Google” — finish setup after you return.
setup.errInvalidToken: Invalid token. Check the container logs (docker compose logs).
setup.errNameDomainRequired: Fill in the name and domain
setup.errPickOneMethod: Enable at least one sign-in method
setup.errGoogleCredsRequired: For Google, paste the Client ID and Client Secret
setup.languageHint: This is the default language for the whole workspace — the interface for new users, plus all reports, emails, AI summaries and notifications. Each user can later change their own interface language in Settings.

install.title: Install the app
install.description: Quick access from your home screen + push notifications, even when the tab is closed

push.hintDefault: Get notified about meetings and tasks even when the app is closed.
push.hintUnsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
push.hintDenied: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings — allow them manually to enable.
push.testDenied: Notifications are blocked in the browser for this site — allow them and try again.
push.testLocalOnly: Local notification sent. If you don't see it, enable notifications for your browser in system settings (macOS: System Settings → Notifications) and turn off Do Not Disturb.
push.testSent: Sent ✓ Don't see the banner? Make sure notifications are allowed for your browser in system settings and that Do Not Disturb / Focus is off.
push.testFailed: Couldn't send. Turn push off and on again, then try once more.
push.bannerSubtitle: Even when the tab is closed

departments.label: Department
departments.subtitle: Group people into departments to gate access and route work.
departments.emptyHint: Create a department to group people and gate access between teams.
departments.deleteConfirm: Delete department "{name}"? Its tasks and meetings stay but lose this department.

settings.name: Name
settings.emailReminder: Email reminder 15 min before a meeting
settings.emailReport: Email with the report after a meeting
settings.actionItemNotif: Notify me when an action item is assigned to me
settings.calendarSyncDesc: Subscribe to your meetings and task deadlines in Google Calendar, Outlook or Apple Calendar — they update automatically.
settings.calendarSyncHint: In Google Calendar: Other calendars → From URL → paste this link. (Google may take a few hours to refresh.)
settings.calendarRegenConfirm: Generate a new link? The current one will stop working in every calendar subscribed to it.
settings.loginPasswordHasDesc: You can sign in with email + password
settings.loginPasswordSetDesc: Set a password to sign in without Google
settings.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.deleteUserConfirm:
Delete user {name} ({email})?

Their meetings and reports will be transferred to you. Tasks and participations will be detached. This action cannot be undone.
settings.addUserDesc: Google invite or an email+password account (set a temporary password).
settings.tempPasswordHint: Set a password to create an email+password account (the user will change it on first sign-in). Leave empty to send a Google invite.
settings.inviteCreatedManual: Created · share the password with the user
settings.resetPasswordDesc: We'll generate a new temporary password. The user will have to change it on first sign-in. Active sessions are not ended.
settings.resetPasswordEmailed: Sent to the user by email.
settings.resetPasswordManual: SMTP is not configured — share the password with the user directly.
settings.signInMethodsDesc: How users authenticate. Saved immediately. At least one must stay enabled.
settings.allowGuestsByLink: Allow guests by link (without an account)
settings.setupOwn2faDesc: You can't require 2FA from admins until you've set it up yourself — otherwise you'd lose access. Once it's set up, the toggle becomes available.
settings.limitsDesc: Technical limits of the self-hosted instance
settings.providerPricingDesc: For cost calculation in the “Usage” tab
settings.apiKeysDesc: Changes apply instantly for new meetings
settings.smtpDesc: Transactional email via your SMTP server
settings.smtpPasswordSet: Password (saved · enter a new one to change)
settings.smtpSsl: SSL/TLS (on for port 465 · off for 587 = STARTTLS)
settings.s3Desc: Storage for meeting recordings (AWS S3 or compatible: MinIO, Wasabi, Cloudflare R2)
settings.s3SecretSet: Secret Key (saved · new one to change)

setupChecklist.title: Finish setup
setupChecklist.summary: {done}/{total} integrations connected · the rest are optional, but they enable email, AI reports, and recording

twofa.adminMustEnable: The administrator must enable 2FA to access the workspace.
twofa.backupCodesIntro: Store these codes in a safe place. Each one works once and will be needed if you lose access to your authenticator app.
twofa.disableConfirmBody: Enter your current code from the app (or a backup code) to confirm disabling.
twofa.enterAppCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twofa.enterBackupCode: Enter one of your backup codes.
twofa.scanInstructions: Scan the QR code in your app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password) or enter the key manually.
twofa.securityDescription: Code from your authenticator app on every sign-in

digest.subject: Garely — weekly digest
digest.meetingsLine: This week you took part in {count} {count, plural, one {meeting} other {meetings}}.
digest.meetingsLineText: This week: {count, plural, one {# meeting} other {# meetings}}.

invite.subject: Invitation to Garely
invite.heading: Invitation to Garely
invite.bodyText: {inviter} invited you to Garely (role: {role}). Sign in with Google: {url}
invite.setupBodyText: {inviter} invited you to Garely (role: {role}). Create your password to activate your account: {url}
invite.setupBodyHtml: {inviter} invited you to join (role: {role}). Create a password to activate your account.

credentials.subject: {workspace} — account access
credentials.intro: An account has been created for you. Sign in and change the temporary password.

passwordReset.subject: {workspace} — password reset
passwordReset.intro: An administrator has reset your password. Sign in and set a new one.

test.subject: Garely — test email
test.heading: SMTP works
test.bodyText: SMTP works. This is a test email from Garely.
test.bodyHtml: This is a test email from Garely. If you can see it, your email settings are saved and correct.

registrationRequest.subject: New registration request
registrationRequest.heading: New registration request
registrationRequest.body: {email} requested access. Approve or decline it in your workspace settings.

registrationApproved.subject: {ws} — access approved
registrationApproved.text: Your request was approved. Sign in with your password: {url}
registrationApproved.body: Your request was approved — you can sign in with your password.

registrationDenied.subject: {ws} — request declined
registrationDenied.text: Unfortunately, your registration request was declined.
registrationDenied.body: Unfortunately, your registration request was declined.

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.domainNotAllowed: Registration is not available for this domain
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds} s.
errors.emailExists: A user with this email already exists
errors.s3NotConfigured: S3 is not configured (fill in bucket, key and secret)
errors.deepgramKeyMissing: Deepgram API key is not set
errors.deepseekKeyMissing: DeepSeek API key is not set
errors.enable2faFirst: Set up your own 2FA first to enable this requirement
errors.atLeastOneAuthMethod: At least one sign-in method must stay enabled
errors.disableGoogleLockout: Before disabling Google SSO, set a password for at least one admin (Users → key icon) — otherwise no one will be able to sign in.
errors.disablePasswordLockout: Before disabling password sign-in, make sure an admin has access via Google — otherwise no one will be able to sign in.
errors.tooManyAttemptsRetry: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds} s.
errors.twoFaAlreadyEnabledDisableFirst: 2FA is already enabled. Disable it first.
errors.cannotDeleteOwnAccount: You can't delete your own account
errors.cannotDeleteLastAdmin: You can't delete the last admin
errors.taskNotInMeeting: The task does not belong to this meeting
